leadText: Bitter Malice (Japanese: うらみつらみ Bitter Grudge) is a damage-dealing Ghost-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is the signature move of Hisuian Zorua and Zoroark.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Bitter Malice inflicts damage and has a 30% chance (50% chance in the strong style ) to leave the target with frostbite . The move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition . Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 15 Agile Strong Power 60 45 75 Accuracy 100% 100% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Chance 30% 30% 50% Turns 3 2 4 ? ? May inflict the target with frostbite Power is doubled if the target has a status condition Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Bitter Malice's PP and power were changed to 10 and 75, respectively. It no longer powers up if the target has a status condition, and it instead lowers the target's Attack by one stage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA The user attacks its target with spine-chilling resentment. This may also leave the target with frostbite. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition. S V The user attacks the target with spine-chilling resentment. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Bitter Malice's Japanese name contains a possible pun, as Urami Tsurami is a rhyme.
